Well, simply put, marketing automation is the use of software to automate marketing processes such as sending emails, segmenting customers into groups, following up with people via email or SMS, and triggering events based on user behavior. And marketing automation makes tasks that would usually be performed manually by humans instant and automatic. And it means that we can have the firepower of a 20-person team working alone from our home office. So marketing automation is basically an advanced software sort of thing that we can use that tracks all of our different users individually and it tracks their behavior and it tracks their actions and everything.
